title: Cognition Signal Broadcasting Infrastructure

module_descriptions.RGE_Cognition_Signal.py: Frozen dataclass RGECognitionSignal with fields packet_id, source_node, destination_node, timestamp. Immutable value object; stdlib only; no runtime logic.
module_descriptions.RGE_Cognition_Channel.py: Class RGECognitionChannel. Maintains a list of callable subscribers. register_subscriber appends a callback; emit delivers the signal synchronously to all subscribers in registration order. No async logic.
module_descriptions.RGE_Signal_Broadcaster.py: Class RGESignalBroadcaster. Thin facade holding a RGECognitionChannel. broadcast(signal) delegates to channel.emit(signal).
module_descriptions.RGE_Recursion_Field_Engine.py (modified): Added import time and RGECognitionSignal/RGESignalBroadcaster imports. Added optional broadcaster parameter to constructor (default None). Modified propagate_packet to capture source_node before delegation, then emit RGECognitionSignal through broadcaster (if configured) after propagation completes. Propagation logic unchanged.

compile_command: python -m py_compile Cognition/RGE_Cognition_Signal.py Cognition/RGE_Cognition_Channel.py Cognition/RGE_Signal_Broadcaster.py Field/RGE_Recursion_Field_Engine.py
design_decisions: RGECognitionSignal is frozen — immutable once constructed, safe to pass across subscribers without defensive copying.
RGECognitionChannel delivers signals synchronously to subscribers in registration order; no async requirements in this stage.
RGESignalBroadcaster is a thin facade to decouple engine from channel implementation details.
source_node captured from location_map before propagator.propagate() executes so the signal reflects the pre-move state accurately.
broadcaster is strictly optional; absence causes silent no-op (no error, no logging gap).
No automatic propagation loops, no scoring, no resonance, no decay logic introduced.
